value.found_quote: You can also control the [web search tool](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/tools-web-search) without granting full network access to spawned commands. Codex defaults to using a web search cache to access results.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "web search tool" that Codex can control, including options for cached, live, or disabled modes. This substantiates that OpenAI offers a web search tool. The page presents it as currently usable with configurable defaults, indicating active status.
